---
pagetitle: "The world looks different with the lights on"
format:
  html:
    page-layout: full
    toc: false
    embed-resources: true
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
editor_options:
  chunk_output_type: inline
---

```{r}
#| label: setup
#| include: false
library(tidyverse)
library(janitor)
library(here)
library(fs)
library(scales)
library(countrycode)

title_font <- "Cabin"
body_font <- "DM Sans"

```

```{=html}
<style>
@import url("https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Cabin:ital,wght@0,400..700;1,400..700&family=DM+Sans:opsz,wght@9..40,400;9..40,500;9..40,700&display=swap");

:root {
  --energy-glow-rgb: 255, 209, 102;
  --energy-page-glow: 0.1;
}

body {
  font-family: "DM Sans", system-ui, sans-serif;
  background:
    radial-gradient(
      circle at 72% 18%,
      rgba(var(--energy-glow-rgb), calc(var(--energy-page-glow) + 0.08)),
      transparent 38%
    )
    fixed,
    linear-gradient(135deg, #05070a 0%, #0a1014 58%, #07090d 100%)
    fixed,
    #05070a;
  color: #f5f2e8;
  transition: background 420ms ease;
}

html {
  background:
    radial-gradient(
      circle at 72% 18%,
      rgba(var(--energy-glow-rgb), calc(var(--energy-page-glow) + 0.08)),
      transparent 38%
    )
    fixed,
    linear-gradient(135deg, #05070a 0%, #0a1014 58%, #07090d 100%)
    fixed,
    #05070a;
}

html,
body {
  overflow-x: clip;
}

#quarto-content,
main,
.page-columns,
.content,
.column-page,
.column-body {
  background: transparent;
  max-width: none;
  width: 100%;
  margin-left: 0;
  margin-right: 0;
  padding-left: 0;
  padding-right: 0;
}

h1,
h2,
h3,
.title {
  font-family: "Cabin", system-ui, sans-serif;
  letter-spacing: 0;
}
</style>
```

```{r}
#| label: load-data
#| include: false
data_url <- "https://raw.githubusercontent.com/rfordatascience/tidytuesday/main/data/2026/2026-05-26"

energy <- readr::read_csv(
  stringr::str_c(data_url, "/energy_cleaned.csv"),
  show_col_types = FALSE
) |>
  janitor::clean_names()

latest_year <- max(energy$yr, na.rm = TRUE)
```


```{r}
#| label: prepare-energy-lamp-data
#| include: false
energy_lamp_data <- energy |>
  dplyr::filter(yr == latest_year) |>
  dplyr::transmute(
    country_name,
    country_code,
    year = yr,
    access_electricity_pct = access_electricity_total_pop_pct,
    rural_access_pct = access_electricity_rural_pop_pct,
    urban_access_pct = access_electricity_urban_pop_pct,
    renewable_electricity_pct = perc_renewable_of_total_electricity_output,
    renewable_consumption_pct = renewable_energy_consumption_tfec_pct,
    transmission_losses_pct = transmission_and_distribution_losses_pct,
    electricity_output_gwh = total_electricity_output_gigawatt_hours
  ) |>
  dplyr::filter(!is.na(access_electricity_pct)) |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    dplyr::across(
      where(is.numeric) & !year,
      \(value) round(value, 3)
    )
  ) |>
  dplyr::arrange(access_electricity_pct, country_name)

readr::write_csv(
  energy_lamp_data,
  fs::path(data_processed_dir, "tt_2026_w21_energy_lamp.csv")
)

energy_lamp_summary <- energy_lamp_data |>
  dplyr::summarise(
    countries = dplyr::n(),
    median_access_pct = median(access_electricity_pct, na.rm = TRUE),
    countries_below_half_access = sum(access_electricity_pct < 50, na.rm = TRUE),
    countries_at_universal_access = sum(access_electricity_pct >= 99.5, na.rm = TRUE)
  )

lowest_access_country <- energy_lamp_data |>
  dplyr::slice_min(access_electricity_pct, n = 1, with_ties = FALSE)
```

::: {.energy-scene}

```{=html}
<style>
.energy-scene {
  box-sizing: border-box;
  width: 100%;
  min-height: 100vh;
  margin: 0;
  padding: clamp(1.2rem, 4vw, 3rem)
    clamp(1.2rem, 4vw, 3rem);
  background: transparent;
  color: #f5f2e8;
  overflow-x: clip;
}

.energy-scene-grid {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(0, 1fr);
  align-items: center;
  max-width: 1040px;
  min-height: calc(100vh - clamp(2.4rem, 8vw, 6rem));
  margin: 0 auto;
}

.energy-scene .observablehq {
  max-width: 100%;
  margin: 0;
  color: #d9e3db;
  overflow-x: clip;
}

.energy-scene .observablehq form,
.energy-scene .observablehq > div {
  color: #d9e3db;
}

.energy-scene .observablehq form {
  display: flex;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.8rem;
  flex-wrap: wrap;
  width: min(520px, 100%);
  margin: 0 0 clamp(1rem, 2vw, 1.4rem) 0;
}

.energy-scene .observablehq form label {
  display: flex !important;
  align-items: center;
  gap: 0.8rem;
  white-space: nowrap;
}

.energy-scene select {
  flex: 1 1 260px;
  min-width: min(260px, 100%);
  color: #f5f2e8;
  background: #0d1217;
  border: 1px solid #46515d;
  border-radius: 4px;
  padding: 0.2rem 0.35rem;
}

.energy-viz-column {
  min-width: 0;
  width: 100%;
  max-width: 980px;
  margin: 0 auto;
}

@media (max-width: 1080px) {
  .energy-scene-grid {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    align-items: start;
    min-height: auto;
  }
}
</style>
```

::: {.energy-scene-grid}

::: {.energy-viz-column}


```{=html}
<style>
.energy-lamp-wrap {
  max-width: 100%;
  min-width: 0;
  margin: 0;
  overflow-x: clip;
}

.energy-chart-header {
  max-width: 920px;
  margin: 0 auto clamp(1rem, 2vw, 1.6rem) auto;
}

.energy-chart-title {
  margin: 0 0 0.35rem 0;
  font-family: "Cabin", system-ui, sans-serif;
  font-size: clamp(2.25rem, 2vw, 4.45rem);
  line-height: 1.05;
  color: #f6f1e7;
}

.energy-chart-subtitle {
  max-width: 70ch;
  margin: 0;
  font-size: clamp(1rem, 1.25vw, 1.18rem);
  line-height: 1.38;
  color: #cbd6cf;
}

.energy-lamp-wrap label {
  font-weight: 700;
}

.energy-lamp-card {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: minmax(230px, 0.9fr) minmax(0, 1.1fr);
  gap: clamp(1.5rem, 2.8vw, 2.4rem);
  align-items: start;
  max-width: 100%;
  min-width: 0;
  min-height: auto;
  margin-top: 1rem;
  padding: clamp(1rem, 2vw, 1.5rem) 0;
  background: transparent;
  color: #f5f2e8;
  overflow: visible;
}

.energy-lamp-card svg {
  width: 100%;
  height: auto;
  display: block;
  overflow: visible;
  transform: translateY(-1.1rem);
}

.energy-lamp-copy {
  display: grid;
  gap: clamp(1.05rem, 1.8vw, 1.45rem);
  align-content: start;
  min-width: 0;
  padding-top: clamp(0.35rem, 0.8vw, 0.75rem);
}

.energy-lamp-country {
  margin: 0;
  font-family: "Cabin", system-ui, sans-serif;
  font-size: clamp(2rem, 2.9vw, 3.25rem);
  line-height: 1;
  overflow-wrap: anywhere;
  hyphens: auto;
}

.energy-lamp-reading {
  margin: 0;
  font-size: clamp(1.15rem, 1.55vw, 1.45rem);
  line-height: 1.35;
  color: #d9e3db;
}

.energy-lamp-kpis {
  display: grid;
  grid-template-columns: repeat(2, minmax(0, 1fr));
  gap: 1rem 1.15rem;
  min-width: 0;
}

.energy-lamp-kpi {
  min-width: 0;
  padding: 0;
  border: 0;
  border-radius: 0;
  background: transparent;
}

.energy-lamp-kpi strong {
  display: block;
  margin-bottom: 0.25rem;
  font-size: clamp(1.35rem, 1.75vw, 1.7rem);
  color: #fff3a1;
  overflow-wrap: anywhere;
}

.energy-lamp-kpi span {
  display: block;
  color: #aeb8b4;
  font-size: clamp(0.95rem, 1.1vw, 1.08rem);
  line-height: 1.28;
}

@media (max-width: 760px) {
  .energy-lamp-card {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
    min-height: auto;
  }

  .energy-lamp-kpis {
    grid-template-columns: 1fr;
  }
}
</style>
```

```{=html}
<div class="energy-chart-header">
  <h1 class="energy-chart-title">When the Lights Come On, Life Opens Up</h1>
  <p class="energy-chart-subtitle">
    Electricity access is more than a percentage. It shapes how people study, work, heal, cook, connect, and feel safe after dark. Select a country to see how access changes the brightness of the bulb, while renewable electricity shapes the color of the glow.
  </p>
</div>
```

```{ojs}
energyLampRowsRaw = FileAttachment("../../data/processed/2026/tt_2026_w21_energy_lamp.csv").csv({typed: true})
```

```{ojs}
energyLampRows = energyLampRowsRaw.map(d => ({
  country_name: d.country_name,
  country_code: d.country_code,
  year: d.year,
  access_electricity_pct: Number.isFinite(d.access_electricity_pct) ? d.access_electricity_pct : null,
  rural_access_pct: Number.isFinite(d.rural_access_pct) ? d.rural_access_pct : null,
  urban_access_pct: Number.isFinite(d.urban_access_pct) ? d.urban_access_pct : null,
  renewable_electricity_pct: Number.isFinite(d.renewable_electricity_pct) ? d.renewable_electricity_pct : null,
  renewable_consumption_pct: Number.isFinite(d.renewable_consumption_pct) ? d.renewable_consumption_pct : null,
  transmission_losses_pct: Number.isFinite(d.transmission_losses_pct) ? d.transmission_losses_pct : null,
  electricity_output_gwh: Number.isFinite(d.electricity_output_gwh) ? d.electricity_output_gwh : null
}))
```

```{ojs}
countryOptions = energyLampRows.map(d => d.country_name).sort(d3.ascending)
```

```{ojs}
defaultCountry = countryOptions.includes("South Sudan") ? "South Sudan" : countryOptions[0]
```

```{ojs}
viewof selectedCountry = Inputs.select(countryOptions, {
  label: "Select a country",
  value: defaultCountry
})
```

```{ojs}
selectedEnergy = energyLampRows.find(d => d.country_name === selectedCountry)
```

```{ojs}
pageGlow = {
  const access = Math.max(0, Math.min(100, selectedEnergy.access_electricity_pct ?? 0));
  const renewable = selectedEnergy.renewable_electricity_pct == null
    ? null
    : Math.max(0, Math.min(100, selectedEnergy.renewable_electricity_pct));
  const renewableGlow = renewable == null ? 0.25 : renewable / 100;
  const glow = d3.color(d3.interpolateRgb("#ffd166", "#2dc66d")(renewableGlow));
  const strength = 0.05 + (access / 100) * 0.34;

  document.documentElement.style.setProperty(
    "--energy-glow-rgb",
    `${glow.r}, ${glow.g}, ${glow.b}`
  );
  document.documentElement.style.setProperty(
    "--energy-page-glow",
    strength.toFixed(3)
  );

  return html``;
}
```

```{ojs}
formatPct = value => value == null ? "not reported" : `${d3.format(".1f")(value)}%`
```

```{ojs}
energyLamp = {
  const row = selectedEnergy;
  const access = Math.max(0, Math.min(100, row.access_electricity_pct ?? 0));
  const renewable = row.renewable_electricity_pct == null
    ? null
    : Math.max(0, Math.min(100, row.renewable_electricity_pct));
  const brightness = access / 100;
  const renewableGlow = renewable == null ? 0.25 : renewable / 100;
  const glowColor = d3.interpolateRgb("#ffd166", "#2dc66d")(renewableGlow);
  const bulbCore = d3.interpolateRgb("#353a3f", "#fff6b8")(Math.max(0.08, brightness));
  const glowOpacity = 0.04 + brightness * 0.46;
  const glowRadius = 86 + brightness * 150;
  const viewBox = "210 76 300 350";
  const bulbPath = "M278 210 C278 141 316 92 360 92 C404 92 442 141 442 210 C442 255 417 286 389 307 C376 316 371 336 371 354 L349 354 C349 336 344 316 331 307 C303 286 278 255 278 210 Z";

  const wrap = html`<div class="energy-lamp-wrap"></div>`;
  const card = html`<div class="energy-lamp-card"></div>`;
  const svg = d3.create("svg")
    .attr("viewBox", viewBox)
    .attr("role", "img")
    .attr("aria-label", `${row.country_name}: ${formatPct(access)} of people had access to electricity in ${row.year}.`);

  const defs = svg.append("defs");

  defs.append("filter")
    .attr("id", "soft-blur")
    .attr("x", "-70%")
    .attr("y", "-70%")
    .attr("width", "240%")
    .attr("height", "240%")
    .append("feGaussianBlur")
    .attr("stdDeviation", 22);

  defs.append("filter")
    .attr("id", "filament-blur")
    .attr("x", "-60%")
    .attr("y", "-60%")
    .attr("width", "220%")
    .attr("height", "220%")
    .append("feGaussianBlur")
    .attr("stdDeviation", 4.5);

  const glow = defs.append("radialGradient")
    .attr("id", "lamp-glow")
    .attr("cx", "50%")
    .attr("cy", "36%")
    .attr("r", "60%");

  glow.append("stop")
    .attr("offset", "0%")
    .attr("stop-color", glowColor)
    .attr("stop-opacity", glowOpacity);

  glow.append("stop")
    .attr("offset", "48%")
    .attr("stop-color", glowColor)
    .attr("stop-opacity", glowOpacity * 0.28);

  glow.append("stop")
    .attr("offset", "100%")
    .attr("stop-color", glowColor)
    .attr("stop-opacity", 0);

  const glass = defs.append("linearGradient")
    .attr("id", "bulb-glass")
    .attr("x1", "30%")
    .attr("x2", "75%")
    .attr("y1", "0%")
    .attr("y2", "100%");

  glass.append("stop")
    .attr("offset", "0%")
    .attr("stop-color", "#ffffff")
    .attr("stop-opacity", 0.65);

  glass.append("stop")
    .attr("offset", "58%")
    .attr("stop-color", bulbCore)
    .attr("stop-opacity", 0.9);

  glass.append("stop")
    .attr("offset", "100%")
    .attr("stop-color", "#f1dc83")
    .attr("stop-opacity", 0.78 + brightness * 0.18);

  const metal = defs.append("linearGradient")
    .attr("id", "lamp-metal")
    .attr("x1", "0%")
    .attr("x2", "100%");

  metal.append("stop")
    .attr("offset", "0%")
    .attr("stop-color", "#434d56");

  metal.append("stop")
    .attr("offset", "50%")
    .attr("stop-color", "#75808a");

  metal.append("stop")
    .attr("offset", "100%")
    .attr("stop-color", "#2f3842");

  svg.append("circle")
    .attr("cx", 360)
    .attr("cy", 215)
    .attr("r", glowRadius)
    .attr("fill", "url(#lamp-glow)")
    .attr("filter", "url(#soft-blur)");

  svg.append("circle")
    .attr("cx", 360)
    .attr("cy", 222)
    .attr("r", 42 + brightness * 80)
    .attr("fill", "#fff7c4")
    .attr("opacity", 0.03 + brightness * 0.22)
    .attr("filter", "url(#soft-blur)");

  svg.append("path")
    .attr("d", bulbPath)
    .attr("fill", "#fff4b8")
    .attr("opacity", 0.12 + brightness * 0.32)
    .attr("filter", "url(#soft-blur)");

  svg.append("path")
    .attr("d", bulbPath)
    .attr("fill", "url(#bulb-glass)")
    .attr("stroke", "#d8e0d7")
    .attr("stroke-opacity", 0.42 + brightness * 0.3)
    .attr("stroke-width", 3.2);

  svg.append("path")
    .attr("d", "M314 199 C332 183 388 183 406 199")
    .attr("fill", "none")
    .attr("stroke", "#fff0a6")
    .attr("stroke-opacity", 0.18 + brightness * 0.65)
    .attr("stroke-width", 16)
    .attr("stroke-linecap", "round")
    .attr("filter", "url(#filament-blur)");

  svg.append("path")
    .attr("d", "M314 199 C332 183 388 183 406 199")
    .attr("fill", "none")
    .attr("stroke", "#fff8c6")
    .attr("stroke-opacity", 0.38 + brightness * 0.58)
    .attr("stroke-width", 7)
    .attr("stroke-linecap", "round");

  svg.append("line")
    .attr("x1", 331)
    .attr("x2", 331)
    .attr("y1", 217)
    .attr("y2", 294)
    .attr("stroke", "#d4c784")
    .attr("stroke-opacity", 0.3 + brightness * 0.4)
    .attr("stroke-width", 3);

  svg.append("line")
    .attr("x1", 389)
    .attr("x2", 389)
    .attr("y1", 217)
    .attr("y2", 294)
    .attr("stroke", "#d4c784")
    .attr("stroke-opacity", 0.3 + brightness * 0.4)
    .attr("stroke-width", 3);

  svg.append("path")
    .attr("d", "M321 145 C340 129 379 127 398 146")
    .attr("fill", "none")
    .attr("stroke", "#ffffff")
    .attr("stroke-opacity", 0.18 + brightness * 0.36)
    .attr("stroke-width", 6)
    .attr("stroke-linecap", "round");

  svg.append("rect")
    .attr("x", 322)
    .attr("y", 350)
    .attr("width", 76)
    .attr("height", 20)
    .attr("rx", 5)
    .attr("fill", "url(#lamp-metal)");

  svg.append("rect")
    .attr("x", 316)
    .attr("y", 369)
    .attr("width", 80)
    .attr("height", 21)
    .attr("rx", 5)
    .attr("fill", "#2f3842");

  svg.append("rect")
    .attr("x", 324)
    .attr("y", 390)
    .attr("width", 72)
    .attr("height", 20)
    .attr("rx", 4)
    .attr("fill", "url(#lamp-metal)");

  d3.range(4).forEach(i => {
    svg.append("line")
      .attr("x1", 321)
      .attr("x2", 395)
      .attr("y1", 356 + i * 14)
      .attr("y2", 349 + i * 14)
      .attr("stroke", "#9aa5ae")
      .attr("stroke-opacity", 0.28)
      .attr("stroke-width", 2.4)
      .attr("stroke-linecap", "round");
  });

  const copy = html`<div class="energy-lamp-copy">
    <p class="energy-lamp-country">${row.country_name}</p>
    <p class="energy-lamp-reading">
      In ${row.year}, ${formatPct(row.access_electricity_pct)} of people had access to electricity.
      The darker the room, the larger the access gap.
    </p>
    <div class="energy-lamp-kpis">
      <div class="energy-lamp-kpi">
        <strong>${formatPct(row.rural_access_pct)}</strong>
        <span>rural electricity access</span>
      </div>
      <div class="energy-lamp-kpi">
        <strong>${formatPct(row.urban_access_pct)}</strong>
        <span>urban electricity access</span>
      </div>
      <div class="energy-lamp-kpi">
        <strong>${formatPct(row.renewable_electricity_pct)}</strong>
        <span>renewable share of electricity</span>
      </div>
      <div class="energy-lamp-kpi">
        <strong>${formatPct(row.transmission_losses_pct)}</strong>
        <span>transmission and distribution losses</span>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>`;

  card.append(svg.node());
  card.append(copy);
  wrap.append(card);
  return wrap;
}
```

:::

:::

:::
